extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial small decrease, the series stays very low until around the middle (roughly flat near zero up to about time 8–9), then rises steeply to its peak around time 12.  
R2: After the peak, the series stays relatively high (plateau/slow decline) until late (around time 18–20) before finally dropping more clearly toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low and flat, then begins rising earlier (around time 6–7) and increases more gradually before its steep jump to the peak (around time 12–13).  
R2: After the peak, the series exhibits a relatively smooth, continuous decline without a long high plateau, falling steadily from mid–late times (about 15 onward) toward a low value at the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value and clearly decreases during the first third of the time, reaching its minimum early (around indices 4–7).
R2: After a sharp rise to a peak in the middle, the series decreases only mildly, so that the final values remain relatively high compared to the minimum (the ending segment stays well above the early minimum).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value and stays near its minimum during the first third of the time, then rises sharply so that the minimum occurs very early (around indices 1–4).
R2: After the middle peak, the series drops strongly so that the final values are close to the early minimum (the ending segment is low, near the initial level).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the main peak (around the middle of the series), the values stay relatively high for several time steps and then decrease slowly.
R2: The final values of the series remain at a medium level (not close to zero).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the main peak (around the middle of the series), the values begin to decrease almost immediately without a long high plateau.
R2: The final values of the series are low, close to zero.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial small decrease, the series rises steeply so that its main peak occurs roughly in the middle of the time axis (around indices 12–18).
R2: After this peak, the series decreases only moderately, remaining at a mid-to-high level (it does not fall close to its starting low level by the end).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an initial small decrease, the series rises steeply so that its main peak also occurs around the middle of the time axis (around indices 12–18).
R2: After this peak, the series keeps decreasing strongly and, by the end of the time axis, falls back to a very low value, similar to or lower than its initial level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value, decreases to a clear minimum very close to zero around the first quarter of the time axis, then rises sharply to its global peak roughly in the middle.
R2: After the middle peak, the series decreases only moderately, staying at mid–high values for several time steps before slowly declining toward the end: the final value is still clearly above the early minimum and not close to zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value already close to zero, remains near this low level for a noticeable initial segment, then rises sharply to its global peak roughly in the middle.
R2: After the middle peak, the series declines steeply and almost monotonically so that the final value is again very low and close to zero, similar to the initial level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series begins at a relatively higher value and shows a clear initial decrease over the first few time steps (early segment is downward sloping).
R2: After a central peak around the middle of the series, the ending values remain moderate (they decrease but stay roughly around the mid‑range instead of dropping near the minimum).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins at or near the minimum level and stays low for the first few time steps (early segment is flat and close to zero).
R2: After a central peak around the middle of the series, the ending values show a strong decline to very low values (final segment slopes sharply downward toward the minimum).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts clearly above zero (around 0.2–0.3), decreases to a small trough near zero around time 5, and then rises steeply to a high peak (around 0.6–0.9) between times 12–18.
R2: After the main peak, the series declines but remains at a moderate level (roughly 0.4–0.7) for several steps before gradually decreasing toward the end without a very sharp final drop.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very close to zero, stays low and flat (near zero) up to about time 6, and then rises more gradually before a steep climb to a high peak (around 0.6–0.8) between times 12–18.
R2: After the main peak, the series either maintains a high plateau for a few steps or quickly begins a strong monotonic decline, ending much lower than the peak with a relatively sharp final drop.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial small decrease, the series rises sharply so that its main peak occurs around the middle of the window (roughly indices 12–18).  
R2: After this mid-window peak, the series stays relatively high for a few time steps and then decreases only moderately toward the end (it finishes at a medium value rather than close to zero).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series rises sharply so that its main peak occurs slightly later than class 0, toward the right side of the window (roughly indices 15–22).  
R2: After this later peak, the series falls steeply and finishes at a low value close to zero.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts in a mid-range value (around 0.2–0.3), dips down to a low plateau near zero by about the 5th–7th time step, then rises sharply to a single dominant peak before time step 15.  
R2: After the peak, the series stays relatively high (above ~0.4) for several steps and then decreases gradually, ending in a mid-range value (around 0.15–0.5), not near zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low (near zero), stays close to zero for the first several time steps, then rises to a main peak between time steps 12–18.  
R2: After this peak the series declines steadily and strongly, ending near zero (below ~0.15) rather than at a mid-range value.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the first peak in the middle of the series, the values stay relatively high and decline slowly, ending at a medium level (around the middle of the vertical range rather than near zero).  
R2: The decline from that middle peak to the end is gentle: the last value is clearly higher than the minimum value reached near the beginning of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the first peak in the middle of the series, the values drop continuously and end near the minimum of the vertical range (close to zero).  
R2: The decline from that middle peak to the end is steep: the last value is close to or lower than the minimum value reached near the beginning of the series.
